justification: The privacy policy explicitly states that user data is used to improve AI models and analytics [L0003], which aligns with the proposed action. The policy also confirms that data is processed in accordance with the privacy notice and user control mechanisms [L0005], which are satisfied in this scenario. No additional conditions or restrictions are mentioned for internal team access to raw data for model training.

source_excerpts.quote: We use your data to improve our AI models, analytics, and other services.
Your data is processed in accordance with this privacy notice and your control over your data.

quote_verification.model_quote: We use your data to improve our AI models, analytics, and other services.
Your data is processed in accordance with this privacy notice and your control over your data.
